inez_redirect_park.speaker: Inez
inez_redirect_park.text: We should visit the park first!

inez_redirect_shop.speaker: Inez
inez_redirect_shop.text: We should visit the shop first!

inez_redirect_bar.speaker: Inez
inez_redirect_bar.text: We should visit the bar first!

day1_city_intro_2.speaker: Inez
day1_city_intro_2.text: I'm Inez. I've been living in Amaranth Heights for years, and I've worked as an archeologist for even longer!

day1_city_intro_3.speaker: Inez
day1_city_intro_3.text: The last thing we have to do for the day is turn our fossils into the museum.

day1_city_intro_4.speaker: Inez
day1_city_intro_4.text: But our workday ends early enough that we have plenty of free time to explore in the evenings.

day1_city_intro_5.speaker: Inez
day1_city_intro_5.text: Oh, I know! What if I show you around town on the way to the museum?

day1_city_intro_pushback.speaker: Inez
day1_city_intro_pushback.text: Oh come on, it'll be fun! We'll go to the museum eventually, there's no rush. Just follow me!

inez_park.speaker: Inez
inez_park.text: This is the park! It's a little small, but Amaranth Heights is surrounded by beautiful sights, so we're never lacking in nature.

inez_shop.speaker: Inez
inez_shop.text: Welcome to the shop! This is a one-stop-shop for all of your needs. Food, clothes, toiletries.. You name it, they probably sell it here.

inez_bar.speaker: Inez
inez_bar.text: Amaranth Heights is pretty quiet, but the bar is always lively! No matter when you come here, there is always someone to converse with.

inez_museum.speaker: Inez
inez_museum.text: And here is our museum! It's probably the coolest thing in town.

inez_museum_2.speaker: Inez
inez_museum_2.text: Since they are helping fund Amaranth Archeology, we come here every day to turn in any fossils we find.

inez_farewell.speaker: Inez
inez_farewell.text: Wow, what a night. Thanks for running all over town with me! Amaranth Heights is a small town, so it doesn't take long to see everything.

inez_farewell_2.speaker: Inez
inez_farewell_2.text: You look tired, we should probably both head home. If you ever have any questions about what to do in your freetime, come find me! I'll be around. Good night!

inez_tour_wait.speaker: Inez
inez_tour_wait.text: Take your time! Come find me when you're ready to move on.

day_1_generic_work_done.speaker: Inez
day_1_generic_work_done.text: What are you still doing here?

inez_day2_greet.speaker: Inez
inez_day2_greet.text: Hi there! How was work today?

inez_day2_good.speaker: Inez
inez_day2_good.text: That's wonderful! I hope you're settling in well here. If you need anything, please just ask me.

inez_day2_bad.speaker: Inez
inez_day2_bad.text: Oh! I'm sorry to hear that. Well, y'know what they say. Tomorrow is a new day!

inez_day2_fossil.speaker: Inez
inez_day2_fossil.text: Can I see? ... Ah.. that looks... That is odd. Did you show Boss?

inez_day2_fossil_player.speaker: Player
inez_day2_fossil_player.text: Yeah. He thinks someone is playing a prank on us.

inez_day2_fossil_inez.speaker: Inez
inez_day2_fossil_inez.text: I see.. Well.. If someone is playing a prank, you should find out who. Why don't you ask around town to see if anyone seems suspicious!

inez_day3_chat_2.speaker: Inez
inez_day3_chat_2.text: Have you figured out anything else since yesterday?

inez_day3_chat_3.speaker: Inez
inez_day3_chat_3.text: Have you figured out anything else since yesterday?

choices.text: Poppy told me to be careful on the dig site.

inez_day3_fossil_4.speaker: Inez
inez_day3_fossil_4.text: You.. you should talk to Camila. This is starting to get weird.

inez_day3_poppy.speaker: Inez
inez_day3_poppy.text: Poppy told me not to eat mushrooms anymore because they control your mind. I wouldn’t pay too much attention to whatever he says.

inez_day3_worry_2.speaker: Inez
inez_day3_worry_2.text: Look, I don’t want to downplay your worries or whatever but...

inez_day3_worry_3.speaker: Inez
inez_day3_worry_3.text: Have you considered that it is just a prank?

choices.text: No, I know something is wrong.

inez_day3_worry_choice_1.speaker: Inez
inez_day3_worry_choice_1.text: Its alright.. New places are difficult for everyone. Try taking your mind off of things.

inez_day3_worry_choice_2.speaker: Inez
inez_day3_worry_choice_2.text: ...Alright. If you’re serious, then you should probably ask around again. Surely someone knows something.
